cards.front: What is the Open Handset Alliance?
cards.back: An alliance of companies that develops and maintains the Android operating system

cards.front: What are the major versions of Android?

cards.back: A fundamental component of the Android application framework, representing a single screen or UI element

cards.front: What are some key features of Android?
cards.back: Multi-touch, Expandable storage, Customizable home screens, Google Play Store, Google Maps

cards.front: What is the Android Architecture Stack?
cards.back: A set of design principles and guidelines for building scalable and maintainable Android applications

cards.front: What is the Linux Kernel in relation to Android?
cards.back: A modified version of the Linux kernel that serves as the core operating system for Android
